zh.lifeSummary: 當Ribald de Bretagne於大約1050年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓斯艾福時，他的父親Ralf de Taillebois32歲，母親Ermengarde Blanche35歲。他和Beatrix de Taillebois至少有4個兒子。他去世於1121年在英國越可爾米德勒哈姆享年72歲，埋葬在英國越可爾米德勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ribald de Bretagne于大约1050年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓斯艾福时，他的父亲Ralf de Taillebois32岁，母亲Ermengarde Blanche35岁。他和Beatrix de Taillebois至少有4个儿子。他去世于1121年在英国越可爾米德勒哈姆享年72岁，埋葬在英国越可爾米德勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Ribald de Bretagne was born about 1050, in Penthièvre, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Ralf de Taillebois, was 32 and his mother, Ermengarde Blanche, was 35. He had at least 4 sons with Beatrix de Taillebois. He died in 1121, in Middleham, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Middleham, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ribald de Bretagne est né environ 1050, à Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Ralf de Taillebois, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde Blanche, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Beatrix de Taillebois. Il est décédé en 1121, à Middleham, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Middleham, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ribald de Bretagne um 1050 in Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralf de Taillebois 32 und seine Mutter Ermengarde Blanche 35. Er hatte mit Beatrix de Taillebois mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1121 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Middleham, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Middleham, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ribald de Bretagne è nato il circa 1050 nel Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Ralf de Taillebois, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde Blanche, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Beatrix de Taillebois. Morì nel 1121, nel Middleham, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Middleham, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: フランスブレタグンモービハンペンスイevア
ja.lifeSummary: Ribald de Bretagneが約1050年にフランスブレタグンモービハンペンスイevアで生まれた時，父Ralf de Tailleboisは32歳，母Ermengarde Blancheは35歳であった。彼はBeatrix de Tailleboisとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1121年にイギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレハムで72歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ribald de Bretagne(이)가 대략 1050년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 펜스이e브르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralf de Taillebois(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde Blanche(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Beatrix de Taillebois(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1121년 영국 요르크실르 미들레함에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 미들레함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ribald de Bretagne nasceu aproximadamente 1050, em Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Ralf de Taillebois, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde Blanche, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Beatrix de Taillebois. Ele faleceu em 1121, em Middleham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Middleham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ribald de Bretagne родился около 1050 г. в местности пентиeвр, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Ralf de Taillebois было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde Blanche, 35. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Beatrix de Taillebois. Он умер в 1121 г. в местности миддлэам, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности миддлэам, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ribald de Bretagne nació aproximadamente 1050, en Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Ralf de Taillebois, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ermengarde Blanche, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Beatrix de Taillebois. Murió en 1121, en Middleham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Middleham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
